videoSnippet.title: If The King Does Not Lead... || Hans vs Vincent || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Lotus Chess March Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/V00be84L
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Niemann, Hans Moke (2725) - Keymer, Vincent (2776) 
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 [06] 2026.03.03
C50 Giuoco Pianissimo

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.c3 a5 6.O-O d6 7.Re1 h6 8.Nbd2 O-O 9.Nf1 a4 10.Bb5 a3 11.b4 Bb6 12.Ng3 Ne7 13.d4 Ng6 14.Bd3 Bg4 15.d5 Nh4 16.Be2 Bxf3 17.Bxf3 Qd7 18.Qd3 c6 19.dxc6 Qxc6 20.Be3 Nxf3+ 21.gxf3 Bxe3 22.Rxe3 g6 23.Rd1 Rfd8 24.Qd2 Nh7 25.h4 h5 26.Rd3 Qc4 27.Nf1 Qe6 28.Kg2 Rd7 29.c4 Qxc4 30.Ne3 Qe6 31.Nd5 Rad8 32.Nb6 Rc7 33.Rxa3 f5 34.Nd5 Rg7 35.exf5 gxf5+ 36.Kf1 f4 37.Rc3 Kh8 38.Ke2 Nf6 39.a4 e4 40.Nxf6 exf3+ 41.Kd3 Re7 42.Rc4 Qf5+ 43.Kc3 Re2 44.Qd3 Qxf6+ 45.Qd4 Qxd4+ 46.Rcxd4 Rxf2 47.Rxf4 d5 48.Rd3 Rc8+ 49.Kb3 Rf1 50.Rdxf3 Rb1+ 51.Ka2 Rcc1 52.a5 Ra1+ 53.Kb3 Rcb1+ 54.Kc2 Rc1+ 55.Kd2 Rc7 56.Rc3 Rg7 57.Rcf3 Rc7 58.Ke3 Ra3+ 59.Kf2 Ra2+ 60.Kg3 Rg7+ 61.Kh3 Ra1 62.Rg3 Rb1 63.Rxg7 Kxg7 64.Kg3 Rb3+ 65.Kf2 Kg6 66.Ke2 Ra3 67.Kd2 b6 68.axb6 Ra6 69.Kc3 Rxb6 70.Kb3 Rb8 71.Rf3 Rb7 72.Ka4 Rc7 73.Rf4 Rd7 74.Kb3 Rb7 75.Rf8 Rd7 76.Rf4 Rb7 77.Rf1 Rb8 78.Ka4 Rc8 79.b5 Rc4+ 80.Ka5 Rxh4 81.b6 Re4 82.Rd1 Kg5 83.Rxd5+ Kg4 84.Rd8 Re7 85.Rg8+ Kf4 86.Rh8 Kg4 87.Ka6 h4 88.b7 Rxb7 89.Kxb7 h3 90.Kc6 Kg3 91.Kd5 h2 92.Ke4
